name: spotter-eld-trip-planner
description: Spotter AI ELD trip planner — Django + Next.js monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names backend,frontend --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run setup:assets && npm run setup:backend
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && cp -n .env.example .env 2>/dev/null || true && python manage.py migrate
scripts.makemigrations: cd backend && . .venv/bin/activate && python manage.py makemigrations trip
